title: The 2036 Issue: Letter From The Editor
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The 2036 Issue: Letter From The Editor

The 2036 Issue takes a look at the challenges and opportunities of the coming decade, and how Bitcoiners can make the most of them.

This post The 2036 Issue: Letter From The Editor first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Shinobi.

title: Senate Crypto Bill Faces Over 100 Amendments Ahead of Thursday Markup
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Senate Crypto Bill Faces Over 100 Amendments Ahead of Thursday Markup

The Senate crypto bill faces a high-stakes markup this Thursday as lawmakers debate 100+ amendments that could determine the future of U.S. digital asset regulation.

This post Senate Crypto Bill Faces Over 100 Amendments Ahead of Thursday Markup first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Blockaid Launches Real-Time Compliance Suite as Institutions Deepen Crypto Exposure
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Blockaid Launches Real-Time Compliance Suite as Institutions Deepen Crypto Exposure

Blockaid launched Risk Exposure, a real-time compliance suite bringing programmable AML controls, transaction screening, and DeFi monitoring to institutional onchain finance as banks deepen crypto exposure.

This post Blockaid Launches Real-Time Compliance Suite as Institutions Deepen Crypto Exposure first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: $11.77 Trillion Brokerage Giant Charles Schwab Launches Spot Bitcoin Trading Platform
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

$11.77 Trillion Brokerage Giant Charles Schwab Launches Spot Bitcoin Trading Platform

Charles Schwab is bringing Bitcoin trading to Main Street: the $11.77 trillion brokerage giant has launched spot BTC trading for U.S. retail clients, deepening Wall Street’s accelerating embrace of digital assets.

This post $11.77 Trillion Brokerage Giant Charles Schwab Launches Spot Bitcoin Trading Platform first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: What’s Really at Stake in the Market Structure Debate: The BRCA
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

What’s Really at Stake in the Market Structure Debate: The BRCA

The Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act (BRCA) is the most important piece of the upcoming CLARITY Act. Without BRCA, Clarity leaves developers open to attack.

This post What’s Really at Stake in the Market Structure Debate: The BRCA first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Kyle Olney.

title: Square Crosses 1 Million Bitcoin-Enabled Merchants as Real-World Adoption Continues to Grow
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Square Crosses 1 Million Bitcoin-Enabled Merchants as Real-World Adoption Continues to Grow

Block, Inc.’s Square has auto-enabled roughly 1 million U.S. merchants to accept Bitcoin payments via the Lightning Network, letting customers pay in BTC while merchants automatically receive USD settlements with near-instant conversion in the background.

This post Square Crosses 1 Million Bitcoin-Enabled Merchants as Real-World Adoption Continues to Grow first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
